title: apicra aspera
intro: Apicra aspera is a species of flowering plant in the family Apicradaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Apicra aspera include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
